resources.string: Shows today’s Islamic prayer times with the current and upcoming prayer highlighted.
Dark style preview of today’s prayer times with next and current prayer highlights.
Light style preview of today’s prayer times with next and current prayer highlights.
An electronic tasbeeh counter you can use directly from your home screen without opening the app.
Dark style tasbeeh counter for your home screen.
Light style tasbeeh counter for your home screen.
Post-prayer adhkar counter that auto-advances through each dhikr and transitions to morning, evening, or sleep adhkar.
Dark style post-prayer adhkar counter for your home screen.
Light style post-prayer adhkar counter for your home screen.
تقويم هجري شهري مصغر يعرض أيام الشهر الحالي مع تمييز اليوم والمناسبات الإسلامية.
